headline: Cresco Labs Awarded Texas Medical Cannabis License
summary: CHICAGO, April 02, 2026--Cresco Labs Inc. (CSE: CL) (OTCQX: CRLBF) (FSE: 6CQ) ("Cresco Labs" or the "Company"), the industry leader in branded cannabis products with a portfolio of America’s most popular brands and the operator of Sunnyside dispensaries, today announced that it has been conditionally awarded a Texas Compassionate Use Program License. It is a vertically integrated license, allowing Cresco Labs to cultivate, process and dispense medical cannabis.

raw.headline: Cresco Labs Awarded Texas Medical Cannabis License

It is a vertically integrated license, allowing Cresco Labs to cultivate, process and dispense medical cannabis.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive CEO Noel Wallace on reinventing a 220-year-old American icon
summary: As America celebrates 250 years, Colgate-Palmolive CEO Noel Wallace reflects on how the company evolved from a small soap business into a global leader in oral care — driven by innovation, purpose, and a commitment to improving health in the U.S. and around the world.

headline: BofA cuts India growth forecast, flags rising inflation risks
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has cut its Indian growth forecast and raised its inflation projections, warning that a prolonged energy price shock from the Middle East conflict is beginning to leave visible marks on the country’s economy.
